title: New panels on the desk
body: This feed, and a compose window that doubles as the contact form. The site is static, so the compose window hands your message to your own mail app rather than pretending to have a backend.

title: One design system, one vocabulary
body: The whole site is one design system: every surface is addressable by a human and an AI through one shared vocabulary, and the AI's hand stays visible on the page as grain. One vocabulary, one direction.

title: PANTRY's mindmap shipped
body: PANTRY's whole-codebase mindmap shipped. It is AI-legible, not AI-powered: it runs no model, it just makes a project easy for an agent already on your machine to read.

title: Closed a loop I called at the top of a note
body: The plan for building PROOF was the first thing on its own board. I published the plan for the plan tool before the tool existed, and it held.

title: PROOF is live
body: The plan board stopped rendering a snapshot and started streaming: cards move as the work moves, pushed over server-sent events, on this very site.
